subject: Micah

assumptions.label: Generalized anxiety
assumptions.notes: Treat as background interpretive context, not as deterministic cause for any single record or behavior.

assumptions.label: Treatment-resistant depression
assumptions.notes: As of 2026-03-05 this is reported as well controlled with medication, though earlier eras may show stronger effect.

guardrails: Do not infer diagnosis from source text alone.
Do not collapse ambiguous behavior into pathology when situational explanations remain plausible.
Treat clinical context as one explanatory lens among several.
Keep analyst context separate from evidence-bearing fact_event and source_unit records.
